title: MANGA NGE The manga characters
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] The manga characters.             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 28, 2006 10:46 am From http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=55103#55103 Sailor Star Dust wrote: Wow, one thing we agree on: fake manga Asuka=bad. ; What's your stance on Manga Shinji and Manga Rei? (Hmm...is this getting off-topic now? Sorry.)

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Nov 28, 2006 11:28 am I dislike the manga Shinji, he's way more of a stereotypical angry teenage protagonist than his anime counterpart. The manga Shinji lacks the realism and humanity of the one in the anime, and I find it harder to care about him as a character.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Tue Nov 28, 2006 3:54 pm MaggotMaster wrote: I dislike the manga Shinji, he's way more of a stereotypical angry teenage protagonist than his anime counterpart. The manga Shinji lacks the realism and humanity of the one in the anime, and I find it harder to care about him as a character.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 03, 2006 9:49 pm Also: what Maggot Master said. ; Rei speaking before spoken to is just weird, and Asuka's turned into a bitch. Also, Kaworu IS evil! Grr! :evil:

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Dec 04, 2006 2:43 am dont want cuz TOJI dies...WTF?!?!...dat sucks mor dick than a rich 80 year old's wife...poor Hikari...

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Mon Dec 04, 2006 12:31 pm master0rolando wrote: dont want cuz TOJI dies...WTF?!?!...dat sucks mor dick than a rich 80 year old's wife...poor Hikari...

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Dec 04, 2006 2:28 pm they should have shown that in the movie... Toji, Kensuke and Hikari wouldve had interesting reactions to a bunch of flying Reis... Kensuke's Rei would've turned into Asuka... Hikari's would've turned into Toji...(notice we never see any of em turn into males in the movie...) Hikari: Someone help meee. Tojiiii!...please...ahh..Toji, your here...i love you Toji ...sploosh

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Mon Dec 04, 2006 3:58 pm master0rolando wrote: Kensuke's Rei would've turned into Asuka...

[]:             Quote Post by Alfonso » Mon Dec 04, 2006 6:49 pm master0rolando wrote: dont want cuz TOJI dies...WTF?!?!...dat sucks mor dick than a rich 80 year old's wife...poor Hikari...

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Tue Jan 09, 2007 10:53 am I know in the anime Shinji looks more real but ,still, wouldn't you beat your own father for killing one of your best friends ? in the anime Shinji stands there like a cow... before his own father.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jan 09, 2007 11:31 am What i don't like, is that Asuka turned into a psycho Michael Muyers version! Why does Asuka has to take most of the crap?

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Tue Jan 09, 2007 11:41 am You can thank Asuka's mother for that

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jan 09, 2007 11:49 am Hell yeah! Though we gotta give her credit for the epic battle in End of Evangelion!--hope Sadamoto will not leave this out--

[]:             Quote Post by Rommel » Tue Jan 09, 2007 2:55 pm I hate how Sadamoto changed the kiss scene. That was such a powerfull, emotional, and in a way, desperate moment, and he butchers it.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 09, 2007 3:08 pm Rommel wrote: I hate how Sadamoto changed the kiss scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 09, 2007 4:17 pm master0rolando wrote: Kensuke's Rei would've turned into a Yak 38 Custom...

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jan 09, 2007 4:28 pm Rommel wrote: I hate how Sadamoto changed the kiss scene. That was such a powerfull, emotional, and in a way, desperate moment, and he butchers it.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jan 09, 2007 8:20 pm I only read the manga once through (to where it left off) and I wasn't too impressed. I'm not an Asuka fan myself so the increase in Rei really did catch my interest a lot more and I felt a few of the additions he put in were actually quite wicked (like when Shinji was over and they made tea or when she wanted to hold his hand again). But I'm trying to remember something and I can't (I had the manga on my computer and then I dumped it for space)- in the manga is Misato actually that big a character? In the anime Misato and Shinji are almost equals in their screentime and character depth and importance. Shinji may be the character the series follows but Misato is definatly the female lead of the series. And if I can remember right I don't remember ANY of the adult characters actually being that prevelant to the manga storyline except Kaji. Am I wrong and just forgeting all the Misato and Ritsuko scenes?

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Wed Jan 10, 2007 9:52 pm ya know...i don't think that she had that big a role in the manga. I don't really mind what he did with Rei; i like both versions. However, Shinji reminds me of Harry Potter. He's not as unique a wuss.

[]:             Quote Post by GoJu » Wed Jan 31, 2007 9:15 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Rommel wrote: I hate how Sadamoto changed the kiss scene.
